errors.meaning: The daily research refresh exceeded its execution window and did not complete, so telemetry may be outdated.
errors.suggestedFix: Increase timeoutSeconds for this job and cap source collection to 3 high-credibility links per run.

errors.meaning: The tweet draft workflow ran too long and failed before delivering a result.
errors.suggestedFix: Split the workflow into two steps (draft generation first, posting only on GO) and lower per-run workload.

errors.meaning: The stablecoin research job did not finish in time, leaving the latest research log potentially incomplete.
errors.suggestedFix: Reduce scope to 3 fresh signals per run and raise timeoutSeconds to match expected research duration.
